name: Pacific Pawn Brokers
description_short: Pacific Jewelry & Loans is a pawn shop and jewelry retailer operating from West Hollywood, selling high-end jewelry, watches, and musical instruments with both new and pre-owned inventory.
description_long:
Pacific Jewelry & Loans, operating under the domain pjlweho.com, is a West Hollywood-based pawn shop and jewelry retailer that functions as both a traditional pawn operation and an upscale jewelry sales business. The company appears to specialize in the secondary market for luxury goods, offering customers the ability to buy, sell, or pawn items of value. The business model combines typical pawn shop functions—providing collateral-based loans in exchange for personal property—with retail sales of curated inventory.

The company's primary offerings include high-end fine jewelry (14K and 18K gold rings, bracelets, necklaces, and earrings with diamonds, emeralds, sapphires, and rubies), designer jewelry brands like David Yurman, luxury watches, and musical instruments (acoustic and electric guitars from brands including Fender, Ibanez, and Epiphone). Inventory ranges from affordable pieces starting under $40 to premium items exceeding $4,500. The business operates an e-commerce platform allowing customers to browse and purchase items online, with features including shopping cart, account login, and payment processing.

Pacific Jewelry & Loans distinguishes itself through a curated selection of designer and brand-name luxury items rather than generic pawn merchandise. The aesthetic and presentation suggest a focus on higher-end clientele compared to typical neighborhood pawn shops. Their online presence and product photography indicate a more retail-oriented approach than traditional pawn operations. The West Hollywood location positions them in an affluent market with established demand for luxury goods.

The primary caveat is that the website provides no information about loan terms, interest rates, redemption policies, fees, or traditional pawn shop operations. While the site functions as an e-commerce platform for selling inventory, there is no transparent disclosure of how the pawn loan side of the business operates, making it difficult for potential borrowers to assess the actual terms and conditions they would receive.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Wide selection of designer and luxury brands including David Yurman, Fender, and Ibanez
Diverse product categories including fine jewelry, watches, and musical instruments
Price range accommodates different budgets, from $39.99 to $4,500+ items
Online shopping platform with e-commerce functionality and product inventory visibility
Specialization in high-end items suggests professional appraisal and authentication
West Hollywood location serves affluent demographic with established luxury goods market
cons: Website contains no information about pawn loan terms, interest rates, or APRs
No transparency on loan-to-value ratios, redemption periods, or fee structures
No clear explanation of whether items are new, used, or previously pawned
Lack of contact information, hours of operation, or customer service details visible on site
No customer reviews or testimonials to verify service quality or trustworthiness
best_for: Luxury jewelry and watch buyers seeking authenticated designer pieces
Musicians looking for quality used or discounted instruments from reputable brands
Individuals with high-value items seeking liquidity through collateral-based loans
Affluent consumers in the West Hollywood area needing quick cash against jewelry or valuables
diagnosis: Pacific Jewelry & Loans is best suited for affluent buyers seeking authenticated luxury jewelry and instruments, or individuals with high-value collateral needing short-term cash. The critical caveat is that the website provides zero transparency about pawn loan mechanics—borrowers cannot determine interest rates, terms, fees, or redemption policies before contacting the business, making it impossible to assess the actual cost of borrowing.
services: Pawn loans secured by jewelry, watches, and musical instruments
Sale of pre-owned and consigned fine jewelry (rings, bracelets, necklaces, earrings)
Sale of luxury watches (men's and women's)
Sale of designer jewelry including David Yurman branded pieces
Sale of electric guitars and bass guitars
Online retail e-commerce platform with shopping cart and checkout
Gold, diamond, and precious metal jewelry retail
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7400 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90046
